data.title: Sanmina Corp invites to Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings call on Jan 26, 2026, at 5:00 PM ET. Access via webcast.
data.description: Sanmina Corporation (NASDAQ: SANM) headquartered in San Jose, California, disclosed its plans for hosting the first quarter fiscal 2026 earnings conference call on January 26, 2026, at 5:00 PM ET. The event will offer a live webcast presentation alongside supporting materials.

data.title: International Paper declares a quarterly dividend of $0.4625 per share for Jan 1 to March 31, 2026, payable on March 17.
data.description: Today, International Paper announced a quarterly dividend of $0.4625 per share for the period spanning January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2026, on its common stock with a par value of $1.00. The dividend is payable on March 17, 2026.

data.title: Corvus Pharmaceuticals will unveil results from Cohort 4 of Soquelitinib trial for Atopic Dermatitis on Jan 20 at 8 AM ET.
data.description: The company will be conducting a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, January 20, 2026 at 8:00 am Eastern Time and 5:00 am Pacific Time. This event is scheduled to provide important updates and insights to investors and stakeholders. Make sure to mark your calendars for this significant event as it will be a valuable opportunity to learn more about the company's current status and future plans.

data.title: JPMorgan concerned as banks and crypto firms merge, with stablecoins yielding interest rates and ETF filings on the rise.
data.description: The convergence between banks and crypto firms is rapidly increasing as yield-bearing stablecoins, ETF filings, and tokenized markets push the limits of financial regulation. This trend is reflected in the growing numbers of partnerships and collaborations between traditional financial institutions and crypto companies.

data.title: McGrath RentCorp to release Q4 2025 financial results after market trading Feb 25, with conference call at 5 pm EST.
data.description: McGrath RentCorp, a top business-to-business rental company in North America, revealed intentions to disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The information will be made public after the regular market closures on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, with a conference call planned for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (2:00 p.m. Pacific Time) to delve into the fourth quarter performance. McGrath RentCorp trades on Nasdaq under MGRC.

data.title: Fogo Mainnet launches featuring Wormhole Bridge; FOGO token plunges 9% to $0.037 amidst volatility. Block times set at 40ms.
data.description: Fogo has recently introduced its Layer 1 mainnet utilizing SVM technology, integrating Wormhole and offering 40ms block times tailored for DeFi traders. The FOGO token is currently trading at $0.037 amidst fluctuations accompanying the launch.

data.title: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. and American Rebel Light Beer partner with Lawrence Distributing Company in Virginia for increased distribution and retail expansion in 2026.
data.description: The distribution company Lawrence Distributing is bolstering the presence of the American Rebel Light brand in Virginia's Valley region. Their efforts are focused on increasing interest from major retailers, improving shelf placement, and driving growth in both on-premise and off-premise sales channels. This move comes as part of a larger push to capitalize on the growing momentum in Virginia.

data.title: C&Y Engineering assists Korean firms in US with structural risks. US standards differ from Korea. Important for companies.
data.description: A U.S.-based company, C&Y Engineering, known for specializing in industrial and manufacturing facility structural engineering, has become a key partner for Korean firms venturing into the American market. The company is focused on tackling a significant challenge often overlooked by Korean businesses - the complexities of local structural design and permitting risks in the U.S. Unlike Korea's standardized design practices, the U.S. system places legal responsibilities on the Engineer of Record. C&Y Engineering is stepping in to address this issue, guiding Korean companies through these intricacies as they navigate the American market. This move aims to assist Korean firms in avoiding potential pitfalls and ensuring compliance with U.S. regulations.

data.title: Inter has obtained approval from Florida OFR and Federal Reserve to establish a U.S. banking branch in Florida.
data.description: Inter has successfully obtained regulatory clearance from the Florida Office of Financial Regulation (OFR) and the Federal Reserve to open a state-licensed international banking branch in Florida. This development will expand Inter's presence in the region and enhance its banking services in the state.

data.title: Bitcoin transitioning into 'macro asset' with $4 trillion market value in 2025, 75% trading range, ended 2025 down 7.9%.
data.description: Binance predicts Bitcoin (BTC) is on the trajectory to evolve into a macro-driven financial asset, propelled by the embrace of institutions, the introduction of regulated products, and the progression in stablecoin oversight. In its evaluation for 2025 and projections for 2026, Binance highlighted 2025 as a significant yet turbulent year for the crypto realm, witnessing a total market valuation exceeding $4 trillion. Throughout the year, Bitcoin experienced fluctuations amidst macroeconomic uncertainties, changes in monetary policies, trade disputes, and geopolitical tensions. Bitcoin exhibited a 75% fluctuation range and concluded the year with a 7.9% decline. Binance emphasized the increasing alignment of crypto price trends with traditional macroeconomic cycles rather than solely dependent on crypto-focused developments. Moreover, institutional involvement in the crypto sphere broadened significantly.

data.title: Linganore Winecellars celebrates 50 years of winemaking in Maryland with special events & promotions.
data.description: Celebrating its 50th anniversary, Linganore Winecellars in Mount Airy, Maryland, is commemorating its milestone with a series of special events and promotions. Established fifty years ago in Frederick County, the vineyard has become a trailblazer in the Maryland wine industry. The festivities are set to take place throughout the year to honor the legacy and success of Linganore Winecellars in the community.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) now offers ZK proof tools for enterprises, allowing private transactions on public blockchain, maintaining compliance.
data.description: Stellar (XLM) has unveiled new ZK proof capabilities that allow enterprises to carry out private transactions on a public blockchain, while still meeting compliance standards. This development aims to provide a secure and regulatory-compliant environment for businesses exploring blockchain technology. With this enhancement, Stellar is enabling users to ensure confidentiality in their transactions while ensuring adherence to necessary regulations. It offers a unique solution for enterprises seeking to leverage the benefits of blockchain while maintaining privacy and meeting industry requirements. This advancement is poised to revolutionize how businesses utilize blockchain technology, potentially opening up new opportunities in the ecosystem.
